title: 9 Amazing Herbal Tinctures for Quick Recovery from Mouth Ulcers
description: Echinacea purpurea tincture is a herbal remedy that has been used for centuries to help heal mouth ulcers. The tincture is made from the roots and flowers of the Echinacea plant, which contains powerful anti-inflammatory compounds. These compounds help to reduce swelling and pain in the mouth, making it easier to eat and drink. Echinacea purpurea also has antimicrobial properties, which help to fight off infections that can cause mouth ulcers to become worse. When applied topically to ...
